授業方法: This course will be conducted mainly face-to-face, but some of the classes may be conducted online (simultaneous or on demand), depending on the pace of the course. General course format:This is NOT a lecture class. Lessons are highly student-centered involving pair and group work. Students are expected to actively contribute to class discussions and respond to other students, including making comments and asking questions. They are also expected to complete their assignments in a timely manner before each class.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
